overview: VibeFlow v40 — a complete full-stack social video app (TikTok + Instagram + Tinder) built as a brand-new standalone project. Features vertical snap video feed, stories, Tinder-style matching, WhatsApp-style chat, WebRTC video/audio calls, creator profiles, live rooms, and 30+ features — all backend-driven with lazy loading for 1M users.
features: Vertical snap-scroll video feed with lazy loading and autoplay
Stories with 24h expiry, reactions, polls, highlights
Tinder-style matching with swipe cards and It's a Match overlay
WhatsApp/Instagram-style chat with emoji reactions, typing indicators, read receipts
Real WebRTC peer-to-peer video and audio calls with incoming call overlay
Creator profiles with premium tiers, analytics, achievement badges
Explore with For You, Following, Trending, Popular tabs
Hashtag pages, trending tags, creator leaderboard
Notifications with inline actions (follow back, accept/decline)
Love theme UI — rose-pink, gold, Playfair Display, iOS mobile-first
Lazy loading everywhere — cursor pagination, skeleton screens, optimistic updates
